title: Notification of National Board (Amendment) 2016

L.-33004/99 vlk/kj.k EXTRAORDINARY Hkkx II—[k.M 3—mi&[k.M (ii) PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) izkf/dkj ls izdkf'kr PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY la- 31] ubZ fnYyh] c`gLifrokj] tuojh 5] 2017@ikS"k 15] 1938 No. 31] NEW DELHI, THURSDAY, JANUARY 5, 2017/PAUSA 15, 1938 सू᭯ म, लघु और म᭟यम उ᳒ म मंᮢ ालय अिधसू चना नई ᳰद᭨ली, 16 ᳰदस᭥बर, 2016 का.आ. 34(अ).—के᭠ ᮤीय सरकार, रा᭬ᮝीय सू᭯म, लघु और म᭟यम उ᳒म बोडᭅ ि नयम, 2006 के िनयम 3 के साथ पᳯठत सू᭯म, लघु और म᭟यम उ᳒म िवकास अिधिनयम, 2006 (2006 का 27) कᳱ धारा 3 कᳱ उपधारा (3) के खंड (ण) ᳇ारा ᮧद᭜त शि᭍तयᲂ का ᮧयोग करते ᱟए, भारत सरकार के सू᭯म, लघु और म᭟यम उ᳒म मंᮢालय कᳱ अिधसूचना सं᭎या का.आ. 226(अ) तारीख 23 जनवरी, 2015 मᱶ िन᭥निलिखत संशोधन करती है, अथाᭅत्:- उ᭍त अिधसूचना मᱶ ᮓम सं᭎या 46 और उससे संबंिधत ᮧिवि᭬टयᲂ के िलए िन᭥निलिखत ᮧिवि᭬टयां रखी जाएंगी, अथाᭅत्- ‘‘46. अपर सिचव और िवकास आयु᭍त सद᭭य सिचव-पदेन’’ (सू᭯म, लघु और म᭟यम उ᳒म) [फा. सं. 1(19)/2013-एनबीएमएसएमई] सुरे᭠ ᮤ नाथ िᮢपाठी, अपर सिचव और िवकास आयु᭍त (एमएसएमई ) ᳯट᭡पण: मु᭎य अिधसूचना का.आ. 226(अ) तारीख 23 जनवरी, 2015 ᳇ारा, भारत के असाधारण राजपᮢ, मᱶ ᮧकािशत कᳱ गई थी। -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF MICRO, SMALL AND MEDIUM ENTERPRISES NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 16th December, 2016 S.O. 34(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by clause (o) of sub-section (3) of section 3 of the Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises Development Act, 2006 (27 of 2006), read with rule 3 of the National Board for Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises Rules, 2006, the Central Government hereby makes the following amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises number S.O. 226(E), dated the 23rd January, 2015, namely:- In the said notification, for serial number 46 and the entries relating thereto, the following shall be substituted, namely:- “46. Additional Secretary and Development Member Secretary – ex officio” Commissioner (Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises) [F. No. 1(19)/2013-NBMSME] SURENDRA NATH TRIPATHI, Addl. Secy. & Development Commissioner (MSME) Note: The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, vide number S.O. 226(E), dated the 23rd January, 2015. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
